metadata.name: Meta-Unification Singularity
metadata.description: 48 brand-new never-before-existing frameworks, synthesizing dimensions never previously combined: necromantic, xenolinguistic, alchemical, ergodic, paleontological, tidal-somatic, crystallographic, mycorrhizal, synesthetic-architectural, spectral-democratic, hauntological-ecological, catabolic-narrative, seismic-pedagogical, liturgical-topographic, magneto-sociological, osmotic-juridical, palimpsestic, embryological-dark-energy, hydraulic-eschatological, ferromagnetic-catastrophe, phononic-ethical, tectonic-mnemonic, pleiotropic-interference, cryogenic-intentional, rhizomatic-eschatological, metallurgical-linguistic, bioluminescent-epistemic, nucleosynthetic-moral, stratigraphic-computational, vestigial-quantum-sociological, geomagnetic-narrative, ossification-logical, trophic-non-Euclidean, interferometric-ethical, phenological-computational, erosive-temporal, piezoelectric-intentional, apophatic-thermodynamic, mycelial-temporal, acoustic-sovereignty, dielectric-narrative, arboreal-dark-matter, endosymbiotic-ethical, speleological-semantic, metamorphic-temporal, cephalopod-ontological, thermocline-logical, and the final unspeakable meta-silence.

operators.name: Singularity Operator
operators.definition: Ω_unspeakable = lim_{n→∞} ∏_{i=1}^n Ω_framework_i = {∅ | ∅ ∋ everything that cannot contain itself}

mechanisms.name: Gödelian self-erasure
mechanisms.function: lambda state: 0.0 if state.get('self_reference', False) else state.get('value', 0)

ontologies.name: Necromantic‑Topological‑Ethical Ontology
axioms: The moral weight of the past curves the topological space of future possibility.
implications: You cannot act freely without the dead.

ontologies.name: Xenolinguistic‑Gravitational‑Mythic Framework
axioms: Myths are gravitational attractors in the phase space of language.
implications: Every language is a different universe with different physical laws.

ontologies.name: Chrono‑Alchemical‑Semiotic Ontology
axioms: Time is the alchemical solvent in which signs dissolve and re-precipitate as transformed substances.
dΣ/dt = α · [Sign]^φ · [Time]^(1-φ) - β · S_entropy^(semiotic) + γ · Φ_gold(meaning)
implications: The alchemist's dream is the semiotician's nightmare: a sign that perfectly transmutes into its referent would destroy all language.

ontologies.name: Ergodic‑Phenomenological‑Viral Ontology
axioms: Consciousness is an ergodic virus – it visits every state of the host-manifold with equal probability over infinite time.
implications: Your most private experience is a virus that has already infected all possible minds – ergodicity guarantees it.

custom_data.note: The complete set of 48 novel frameworks is listed above. Each is a BRAND_NEW_FRAMEWORK with is_new: true, is_meta: true, and samsara_status: NEVER_EXISTED.
